# hkdf_sha256 (Data Source)

Derives key material using HKDF-SHA256 ([RFC 5869](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc5869)).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Derive a 32-byte key from a base64-encoded secret
data "hkdf_sha256" "example" {
  secret = "dGhpcyBpcyBhIHNlY3JldA==" # base64("this is a secret")
  info   = "example key derivation"
  length = 32
}

# Use the derived key
output "derived_key_b64" {
  value     = data.hkdf_sha256.example.result
  sensitive = true
}

output "derived_key_hex" {
  value     = data.hkdf_sha256.example.result_hex
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `info` (String) Context and application-specific information (info string).
- `length` (Number) Number of bytes to derive. Maximum 255 * 32 = 8160.
- `secret` (String, Sensitive) Input keying material (IKM), base64-encoded.

### Optional

- `salt` (String) Optional salt value, base64-encoded. If omitted, HKDF uses a zero-filled salt per RFC 5869.

### Read-Only

- `result` (String, Sensitive) Derived key material, base64-encoded.
- `result_hex` (String, Sensitive) Derived key material, hex-encoded.
